changelog: Feature: Google Sign-In – added native Google authentication via Capacitor Social Login on Android and popup-based sign-in on web.
Feature: Custom notification sound – upload any audio file, auto-trim to 5 seconds, and use it as your rest timer notification sound.
Feature: Notification volume boost – volume slider (50%–200%) with native alarm-stream routing for louder rest timer alerts.
Fixed: Firebase authorized-domain error – resolves Google sign-in popup blocked on local network IPs.
